text: A microwave  oven sitting on top of an old fashioned refrigerator.
A rainbow in the sky over a street.
A small child in a baseball uniform is stationed next to one of the bases.
Black and white Toyota truck with two dogs on back.
A bathroom area with photograph, toilet and white walls.
A parent is pulling their child down the ski slope.
A person standing next to a small lighthouse.
A backpack and a bike sitting on a trail.
A woman in a white dress standing next to a man in front of a cake.
Four sheep are running around in a field.
